---
id: query-automation-manual-trigger-list
title: "获取手动触发器列表"
description: "可根据自动化 ID 查询对应自动化下的手动触发器列表。"
sidebar_label: "获取手动触发器列表"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"获取手动触发器列表"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations/manual-triggers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



可根据自动化 ID 查询对应自动化下的手动触发器列表。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"automationIds","required":false,"description":"自动化 ID 列表。\nURL 示例：automationIds=xx1,xx2 或 automationIds=xx1&automationIds=xx2。\n为空时，响应结果返回您可访问的全部自动化下的手动触发器。\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"enabledOnly","required":false,"description":"是否仅返回已启用自动化下的手动触发器。<br />true：仅返回已启用的自动化对应的手动触发器。<br />false：返回所有自动化下的手动触发器。","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"in":"query","name":"includeSpace","required":false,"description":"是否返回手动触发器所属自动化当前关联的空间。<br />true：返回手动触发器所属自动化当前关联的空间。<br />false：不返回空间信息。","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","description":"手动触发对象列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","automationName","triggerNodeId","triggerName","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"自动化ID。"},"automationName":{"type":"string","description":"自动化名称。"},"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"手动触发节点ID。"},"triggerName":{"type":"string","description":"手动触发名称。"},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"所属自动化是否启用。<br />\ntrue：启用；<br />\nfalse：禁用。\n"},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"自动化类型。"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"创建时间（毫秒时间戳）。"},"space":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["spaceId","name"],"properties":{"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"空间 ID。"},"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间 ID。"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"空间名称。"},"spatialMarking":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"空间标记。"},"children":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"items":"circular(SpaceNode)","description":"子空间列表（递归结构）。"}},"title":"SpaceNode"}],"nullable":true,"description":"自动化当前关联的空间；仅 includeSpace 为 true 时返回，未关联空间时为
